hooks.command: echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH" | grep -q 'package-lock.json' && echo 'BLOCK: Do not edit package-lock.json directly. Run npm install instead.' && exit 1 || exit 0

echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_COMMAND" | grep -q 'git commit' && ! echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_COMMAND" | grep -q 'git add' && ! git diff --quiet 2>/dev/null && echo 'BLOCK: Unstaged changes detected. Use git add -A && git commit or stage changes first.' && exit 1; exit 0
